title: Gentle finger bends
instructions: Rest your forearm on a table with your hand relaxed.
Slowly bend the affected finger only as far as comfortable.
Straighten the finger again without forcing the joint.
contraindications: Stop if pain becomes severe, the finger changes color, or numbness appears.
Follow any limits your clinician gave after cast or splint removal.

title: Light tendon glide sequence
instructions: Move from a straight hand to a gentle hook shape.
Return to straight, then make a light fist if comfortable.
Keep the motion slow and avoid gripping hard.
contraindications: Do not continue through sharp pain or sudden swelling.
Skip any shape your clinician told you to avoid.

title: Tabletop finger lifts
instructions: Place your palm flat on a table.
Lift the affected finger slightly, then lower it with control.
Keep the rest of the hand relaxed.
contraindications: Do not use weights or resistance in this version.
Stop and contact a clinician if movement suddenly becomes worse.

title: Soft object touch practice
instructions: Touch a soft towel or sponge with the affected hand.
Practice a light touch without squeezing.
Relax the hand fully between attempts.
contraindications: Do not grip hard or use resistance bands.
Stop if swelling, color change, or numbness appears.
